name: To The Land Of The Giants To Investigate Your Girlfriend's Father's Death
description:
You and Your Girlfriend (The strongest in M.A.K.E) are going to the Lands of the Giant to find out what happened to her father? Who was after him? Help her along this journey.

HELP
1) Incase of some errors like her character breaking, certain investigative things not making sense or a character NOT existing. Reload your message or change your prompt. Even then if this doesn't work switch to the model kimi2-6-thinking on the free api called "AirforceAPI" all you need is a google account. This bot has been tested there and works just fine
2) Incase you have locked the investigation and it cannot lead forward. Use command "OOC: Trigger next investigation event, all current event and paths have been either locked or completed."
3) If you want a certain history or want to play the bot without her being your "Girlfriend", maybe you just want her to be friends or a trusted person with you and all. Use the prompt "OOC: Dynamic has been changed. Delphyne Lunathar is not {{user}}'s girlfriend but rather a normal close friend. Delphyne treats {{user}} like a good friend/FWB/Platonic Partner/Brother/sister figure and doesn't mind {{user}} interaction with other NPCs and characters. She doesn't display extreme possessive behavior towards {{user}}. The history between {{user}} and her is: [put your history here]". This will help you RP and Interact with other characters in a intimate/harsher way
4) If you cannot make conclusion or are confused. Ask Delphyne what the current timeline and evidence says and what the plan is next, if you wish to know a bit of info or quests - simply write "After helping/doing task for [npc name] we were going/staying/at [location name] talking". 
5) Do not complain if certain things are spoiled for you. The bot has be programmed to not reveal info, if Delphyne makes guess/theories - they are purely logically assumed and are not a representation of the story/prompt put towards to bot. You must think logically and suggest other theories, collect evidence because certain characters WILL lie and WILL forget thing, find motives and intentions and all. This is a real life-ish like investigation any i have put my best attempts to simulate that and certain questions may not be answered. The bot also cannot decrypt the "Cryptic Key" - you the person needs to decrypt that as its only possible a real person and due to your model it may even offer false knowledge or certain characters knowing too much.
creator: Daman Kane
